MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Angie Diner, CSR 581. Telephone # 415 551 3775 (514)

Ryan J. Patterson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, FAUSTINA PEDROSA.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARGARET HAIG, HER TESTATE AND INTESTATE SUCCESSORS, AND ALL PERSONS CLAIMING BY: THROUGH, OR UNDER HER;
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations submitted and filed in support or entry of Default Judgment are admitted in evidence.
Faustina Pedroza sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff through Spanish Interpreter Netza Cabrera.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

The lien recorded by defendant Margaret Haig for $14,025.00 on December 19, 1973 as Document W41263, Book B840, on plaintiff Fustina Pefroza's pproperty located at 1057 Florida Street, San Francisco, California is fully satisfied, released and discharged. Accordingly, the Court grants Judgment in favor of Plaintiff FAUSTINA PEDROSA and against defendant
MARGARET HAIG, HER TESTATE AND INTESTATE SUCCESSORS, AND ALL PERSONS CLAIMING BY: THROUGH, OR UNDER HER, to quiet title on the Property.
Judgment signed in open court.
